title: 1001 Carpet Stain Remover 500ml Pack of 6 | Tough Carpet Cleaner Spray for Stains, Spills & Pet Odours | Fast Acting Carpet & Upholstery Cleaner – Fresh Scent, Easy to Use
features: Tackle tough stains fast with 1001 Carpet Stain Remover. Removes dirt, grease, coffee, wine, and pet accidents from carpets, rugs, and upholstery without damage. Delivers visible freshness and long-lasting results every time.

Simply spray the stain, blot with a clean cloth, and let dry. No rinsing or scrubbing needed. The quick-dry formula penetrates carpet fibres deeply, making stain removal effortless while saving time and energy.

Gentle bleach-free formula save for homes with pets and children. Effectively removes pet stains and odours without harsh chemicals, leaving a clean, fresh fragrance that keeps your home smelling great all day.
Enjoy a naturally clean home with every use. This odour-neutralising spray leaves carpets soft, refreshed, and residue-free. Keeps fabrics and fibres looking newer for longer with regular cleaning.
Includes 6 x 500ml bottles providing excellent value for regular use. Ideal for households, landlords, and professional cleaners who need a reliable and effective carpet cleaning solution at hand.
description: Product description Keep your carpets, rugs, and upholstery looking spotless and fresh with the 1001 Carpet Stain Remover 500ml Pack of 6 – your reliable solution for everyday spills, stubborn stains, and pet odours. Specially designed for modern homes, this fast-acting formula penetrates deep into carpet fibres to lift dirt and grime effortlessly, leaving your home clean and refreshed in minutes. Whether it’s muddy footprints, coffee spills, food stains, or pet accidents, 1001 Carpet Stain Remover delivers professional-quality cleaning without the need for harsh scrubbing or rinsing. The advanced quick-dry technology allows you to spray, blot, and go – making stain removal easier and faster than ever. The gentle, bleach-free formula is safe for use around pets and family members, providing peace of mind with every clean. Its odour-neutralising action effectively eliminates unwanted smells from carpets and upholstery, leaving behind a light, fresh scent that keeps your living space inviting. Each pack contains six 500ml bottles, giving you lasting value and convenience for everyday home maintenance. Ideal for living rooms, bedrooms, hallways, and even car interiors, this multi-purpose spray is the go-to choice for keeping fabrics, carpets, and rugs looking their best. With 1001 Carpet Stain Remover, you get visible results, a pleasant fragrance, and easy usability all in one product. Keep one bottle in every room so you can tackle messes as soon as they happen, ensuring your home stays clean, fresh, and beautifully maintained every day. Ingredients window & Mirror Cleaner
